text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Involuntary Psychiatric Intervention 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF WASHINGTON COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER CIVIL COMMITMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides consultation, assessment, and investigations to determine if a person meets the legal criteria for a judge to rule whether or not they should receive treatment against their will. 5250 NE Elam Young Parkway Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing a mental illness, in immediate danger of harming themselves or others, unable to care for basic needs, or refusing treatment Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (503) 846-4528 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WASHINGTON COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CIVIL COMMITMENT PROGRAM
